scripts.supabase:deploy-auth: npx supabase functions deploy secure-auth --project-ref jilzklxnejztpphbryti --no-verify-jwt --use-api
scripts.supabase:deploy-alerts: npx supabase functions deploy send-security-alert --project-ref jilzklxnejztpphbryti --use-api
scripts.supabase:deploy-drainage-reminders: npx supabase functions deploy diesel-drainage-reminders --project-ref jilzklxnejztpphbryti --no-verify-jwt --use-api
scripts.supabase:deploy-functions: npm run supabase:deploy-auth && npm run supabase:deploy-alerts && npm run supabase:deploy-drainage-reminders
